vibe: Cyberpunk, AI-ops, Autonomous Command Center, precise, stealth, high-tech, cinematic

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: py-24, py-32 for sections. gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.

grids.skills_grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6. Mix square and wide spans.
grids.projects_grid: 1 column on mobile, 3 columns on desktop. Heavy focus on image with dark gradient overlays.
grids.metrics_grid: Bento 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, minimal padding, 1px solid borders, neon numbers.

surface_strategies.hero: Dark void with radial gradient overlays. Use a 3D neural-network visualization in the background using @react-three/fiber.
surface_strategies.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-zinc-950/40 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-zinc-800 rounded-[32px] overflow-hidden.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary CTA: Flat black background, 1px solid #00E5FF border, #00E5FF text. Hover: bg-[#00E5FF]/10. Geometric, sharp.
surface_strategies.nav: Sticky glass header (z-50): backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#020617]/70 border-b border-zinc-800/50.

motion.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up for all grid items. y: 40 -> y: 0, opacity: 0 -> opacity: 1, duration: 0.6.
motion.hover_states: Cards: subtle scale (1.02), border color shift to #00E5FF/50, image slight zoom.
motion.advanced_upgrade: Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei in the Hero section to render an interactive, slowly rotating 3D particle network (glowing cyan and emerald nodes connecting).

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='contact-form-submit-button', data-testid='project-legion-core-card'.

hero_background.description: Abstract geometric lines and shapes on black background

project_legion_core.description: Detailed illuminated server racks showcasing modern technology infrastructure

project_atlas_memory.description: Blue lit computer server rack in a data center

setup: Add google fonts Unbounded, Outfit, and JetBrains Mono to index.html.
structure: Build a single-page portfolio with sticky navigation.
Implement the 3D Neural Network as an absolute background in the Hero section using @react-three/fiber.
Sections: Hero (with 3D bg), Identity/Specialization Panel, Skills Grid, Featured Projects, Mission Statement, Systems Metrics, Contact Form.
Ensure all borders are zinc-800 and rounded-[32px] for major cards.
design_rules: Follow E1's Universal Design Rules: layered depth, blur-3xl opacity-20 colored glows under cards.
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) background anywhere.
Ensure the 3D network has transparency so the dark background (#020617) shows through.
data_requirements: The contact form must be fully functional (connected to FastAPI + MongoDB backend).
Include placeholder links for Resume/CV, GitHub, LinkedIn, X-Twitter.
Ensure System Metrics are displayed as a live telemetry dashboard (animated counters or static high-contrast metrics grid).
